body.content:
Hi Client Name, Just letting you know that "Level 5" has been canceled. Feel free to book a new service or reach out if you have any questions. | Hello,
We have made the difficult decision to cancel today's classes due to the Master's illness. You will get one class credit for your future makeup class.(You can rebook another class this week or you can use it in July.) Just let us know when you want to use your credit.
We apologize for this short notice and any inconvenience caused. Thank you for your understanding, and please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions. Thank you!

Level 5

Date: June 19, 2024 at 6:50 PM PDT

Location: Fitness Studio Location

Staff: ${staff_member_n‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
